expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: search box selector dropdown planning covers OK or Cancel confirmation, pending selection, and dismissal outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the focus is stated and then covered in detail: it models "Pending Selection (uncommitted)", "OK / Confirm (commit)", "Cancel (revert)", and "Dismissal pathways" including "Click outside / blur dismissal" and "Explicit close icon / collapse control" with expected outcomes (discard pending, keep committed, close dropdown, no commit event).

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly scoped to "Phase 4a — Confirmation & Dismissal Outcomes Planning" and contains phase-appropriate planning elements (state transitions, commit vs pending rules, dismissal handling, and "Minimal acceptance checks (phase4a)") without drifting into other phases.
